name: 诡事其一珍珠剧院
short_description: You will play a boy who lives with his childhood sweetheart and is preparing for the law test, but is involved in a strange incident because of a prank of his childhood sweetheart who travels for work.
detailed_description:
Plot Summary
This is a simple horror short story, completely overhead setting, using some Chinese traditional elements and horror elements added to the game to add atmosphere, this game will mainly show the story line of the male protagonist
The story takes place in a place called Shanhai City, the player will play male Xiangyang is a cohabit with childhood sweetheart Yanan method test preparation candidates, Yanan need to leave Shanhai city because of work reasons, looking at the day to prepare for the examination not out of the house Xiangyang, before leaving secretly with Xiangyang made a joke, at the same time Shanhai City unknown haze finally spread to the little couple.

Gameplay
The player will play a male master in the game, the beginning of the game will also enter the countdown, the haze first came to the male master, and control male master you can only use the props can be found, crack the puzzle, looking for ways to save the fate of the male master, and finally use your wisdom to seal the monster

The End
This game contains three endings
